name: byNordic Acquisition Corporation Warrant
summary: byNordic Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. These warrants entitle the holder to purchase ordinary shares in the combined company. byNordic initially intends to focus on companies located in Europe or the United States with enterprise values between $500 million and $1.5 billion.
